summary: Iteration 11: Comprehensive testing of major UI restructure for Four Seasons CRM. Admin and salesperson now see completely different experiences. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified admin sees Company Overview (not salesperson dashboard), correct tabs (Overview | Salespeople | All Data), global KPIs ($216,906 revenue, 22 closed, 53 leads, 41.5% rate), comparison charts, and Salesperson Performance table. Benjamin (salesperson) correctly sees Dashboard | Follow-ups | Data tabs with his own KPIs. One issue found: Franco (salesperson with 0 leads) sees Benjamin's data due to backend fallback logic.

critical.issue: Franco (salesperson with 0 assigned leads) sees all 53 leads instead of empty dashboard due to fallback logic at lines 1127-1129 and 1225-1229 in server.py. Test requirement says Franco should see empty dashboard with 0 leads.

passed_tests: Admin login (bsanchezcar@gmail.com / Benja123) - returns token with admin role
Benjamin login (bcardarelli@fshac.com / Benja123) - returns token with salesperson role
Franco login (fbarbagallo@fshac.com / Franco123) - returns token with salesperson role
Invalid login credentials correctly rejected with 401
Admin sees Company Overview title (NOT salesperson dashboard)
Admin has 3 tabs: Overview | Salespeople | All Data (no Follow-ups)
Admin Overview shows global KPIs: $216,906 revenue, $25,470.99 commission, 22 closed, 53 leads, 41.5% rate
Admin Overview shows Revenue & Commission comparison chart
Admin Overview shows Leads & Conversions comparison chart
Admin Salesperson Performance table shows Benjamin #1 with correct stats
Admin Salespeople tab shows User Management section
Admin All Data tab shows all leads with Salesperson column
Benjamin (salesperson) sees Dashboard | Follow-ups | Data tabs (no admin tabs)
Benjamin Dashboard shows his own KPIs with data (not 0)
Benjamin Data tab shows his 53 leads
Salesperson blocked from admin endpoints with 403
Admin comparison shows Franco with 0 leads, 0 closed, $0 revenue, 0% rate
Delete lead requires authentication (401 without token)
action_items: HIGH: Fix backend fallback logic that gives Franco (0 leads) access to all data. Lines 1127-1129 and 1225-1229 in server.py should NOT return all leads when user has 0 assigned. Franco should see empty KPIs (0 revenue, 0 leads, 0 closed).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1127-1129: Fallback logic 'if not leads and user: all_count = await db.leads.count_documents({})' returns all leads when a salesperson has 0 assigned leads. This violates data isolation - Franco should NOT see Benjamin's leads.
server.py lines 1225-1229: Same fallback issue in /api/leads endpoint - returns all leads if user has none assigned.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All admin/salesperson UI verified, Franco data isolation issue needs backend fix

seed_data_creation: 53 leads assigned to Benjamin S. Cardarelli. Franco has 0 leads assigned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified the major UI restructure. Admin now sees Company Overview with global KPIs and comparison charts on the Overview tab, User Management on Salespeople tab. Salespeople see their personal Dashboard with My Money section. Key issue: Franco (new salesperson with 0 leads) incorrectly sees Benjamin's 53 leads due to fallback logic in server.py. The fallback should be removed or modified so salespeople with 0 assigned leads see empty data.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Franco sees Benjamin's data instead of empty dashboard
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend fallback logic in server.py returns all leads when a user has 0 assigned leads
reproduction_steps: 2. View Dashboard - shows data instead of 0
3. API call to /api/dashboard/kpis with Franco's token returns Benjamin's 53 leads data
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Remove or conditionally disable the fallback logic. When salesperson has 0 leads, return empty KPIs/leads rather than all data.
